brand_identity.name: PourPal
anti_patterns: No 'cute' illustrations - use photography or refined iconography

headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Bartender names

cards.classes: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-xl

primary.classes: bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-3 hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(198,142,23,0.3)] transition-all uppercase tracking-wide text-sm

secondary.classes: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all uppercase tracking-wide text-sm

inputs.classes: bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-white/20 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-lg h-12

layout_strategies.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 for grids.
layout_strategies.container: max-w-md mx-auto md:max-w-4xl lg:max-w-6xl px-4 md:px-8
layout_strategies.mobile_nav: Bottom fixed bar, blurred glass background, iconic navigation.
layout_strategies.bento_grid: Use for Bartender Profile: Hero (2x2), Schedule (1x2), Map (1x1), Tips (1x1).

visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) to the body background to prevent color banding.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient glows instead of hard drop shadows. shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]

motion.micro_interactions: Buttons scale down slightly (0.98) on click.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is #E5E5E5 or lighter on dark backgrounds.

hero_backgrounds.description: Bottles on illuminated shelves - Use for Landing Page Hero Background
Frothy cocktail close up - Use for Happy Hour/Drink features

bartender_profiles.description: Bartender mixing with jigger - Use as default bartender cover or example profile
Bartender mixing cocktail - Use for search results example

accents.description: Craft Pub Neon - Use for decorative elements or login screen

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install fonts 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts immediately.
2. THEME: Force 'dark' class on the html element. This app does not have a light mode.
3. CLEANUP: Delete App.css content. Use Tailwind for everything.
4. COMPONENTS: heavily customize Shadcn components. Remove default white backgrounds. Set borders to white/10.
5. NAVIGATION: Create a mobile-first bottom navigation bar for the main app layout.
6. MAPS: When integrating Google Maps, use a custom dark style JSON to match the app aesthetic.
7. IMAGES: Use the provided URLs for placeholders. Do not use gray div placeholders.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
